meaning: n.小路,巷,(花园里两边有树篱的)小径
examples: I dodged back into the alley and waited a minute.
When he saw the police arrive, he bolted down an alley.
He wheeled his bike into the alley at the side of the house.
Another alley sells honey from Yemen and dates from Qatar, Saudi Arabia and Oman .
Driving slowly to avoid the children and chickens, we turned down an alley that led towards the riverbank.
